name: Hot White Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. PLACE CHOCOLATE, BRANDY and vanilla in the top of a double boiler filled with boiling water.
2. PLACE OVER MEDIUM HEAT AND COOK UNTIL CHOCOLATE IS MELTED.
3. REMOVE FROM HEAT BUT KEEP CHOCOLATE MELTED IN THE DOUBLE BOILER.
4. ADD YOLKS AND MIX UNTIL INCORPORATED.
5. IN A SMALL POT, SCALD MILK OVER MEDIUM HEAT.
6. IMMEDIATELY REMOVE FROM HEAT AND SLOWLY POUR OVER THE MELTED CHOCOLATE, STIRRING CONSTANTLY.
7. POUR INTO MUGS AND SERVE IMMEDIATELY.
